## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill update
- [ ] Script or tooling change
- [ ] Other

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I read the changed files myself.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, tokens, private keys, or `.env` files.
- [ ] I did not include real client, customer, legal, medical, employee, student, or confidential data.
- [ ] I avoided machine-specific paths and local-only assumptions.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if the skill list or install instructions changed.

## Testing

Describe how you checked the change.
